jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Zebronics
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Zebronics! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Coimbatore team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Zebronics:
Zebronics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zebronics!
